title: Replace Analysis with Console
description: Retire the Analysis shell and Activity nav entry in favor of a unified Console area in the dashboard.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
# Console Design Spec v1

## Goal
Build `/lab/console` as a chat-first workspace with a persistent top controls strip and a collapsible right artifact pane. Replace the current tab-selector UI.

## Layout
- Top controls row (always visible): existing `ScorecardContext` + `Actions` menu.
- Workspace below controls: 3 columns.
- Left column: chat session list.
- Middle column: active chat session UI.
- Right column: artifact pane, collapsed by default.

## Artifact Model
- `artifactKind`: `none | activity | board | report`.
- `artifactPayload`: contextual data for selected artifact.
- `isOpen` + `isCollapsed` + `width` for right pane state.
- Artifact transitions handled in one controller/hook.

## Actions Behavior
- Add `Show Activity` action in the top actions menu.
- `Show Activity` opens the right pane and renders embedded `ActivityDashboard`.
- Session list and chat pane remain visible while artifacts are shown.

## Chat and Procedure Runtime
- Chat is backed by Tactus procedures.
- Built-in procedure runs REPL loop using standard HITL requests:
  - assistant turn
  - HITL request for user input
  - user response
  - repeat
- Persist chat by session so left list is data-backed.

## UI Technology
- Use Vercel AI Elements for chat UI composition.
- Add adapter boundary between Elements component model and Tactus/HITL message model.

## Visual Requirements
- Remove light-outline/border artifacts in dark mode for Console placeholder states.

## Scope and Defaults
- Canonical route remains `/lab/console`.
- Global dashboard right chat panel behavior remains unchanged in this phase.
- Board artifact stays placeholder-backed this phase.
- Report artifact plumbing is included; report picker UX may be phased.
- Kanbus issue comments are source of truth until wiki-write path is confirmed.
